2603.29386.title: PromptForge-350k: A Large-Scale Dataset and Contrastive Framework for Prompt-Based AI Image Forgery Localization
2603.29386.paper_summary: The rapid democratization of prompt-based AI image editing has recently exacerbated the risks associated with malicious content fabrication and misinformation. However, forgery localization methods targeting these emerging editing techniques remain significantly under-explored. To bridge this gap, we first introduce a fully automated mask annotating framework that leverages keypoint alignment and semantic space similarity to generate precise ground-truth masks for edited regions. Based on this framework, we construct PromptForge-350k, a large-scale forgery localization dataset covering four state-of-the-art prompt-based AI image editing models, thereby mitigating the data scarcity in this domain. Furthermore, we propose ICL-Net, an effective forgery localization network featuring a triple-stream backbone and intra-image contrastive learning. This design enables the model to capture highly robust and generalizable forensic features. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves an IoU of 62.5% on PromptForge-350k, outperforming SOTA methods by 5.1%. Additionally, it exhibits strong robustness against common degradations with an IoU drop of less than 1%, and shows promising generalization capabilities on unseen editing models, achieving an average IoU of 41.5%.
2603.29386.paper_summary_zh: 快速的基於提示的 AI 圖像編輯的民主化最近加劇了與惡意內容製作和錯誤信息相關的風險。<lb/>然而，針對這些新興編輯技術的偽造定位方法仍然顯著不足。<lb/>為了填補這一空白，我們首先介紹了一個完全自動化的遮罩標註框架，該框架利用關鍵點對齊和語義空間相似性來生成精確的編輯區域真實遮罩。<lb/>基於這一框架，我們構建了 PromptForge-350k，一個大型偽造定位數據集，涵蓋四種最先進的基於提示的 AI 圖像編輯模型，從而減輕了該領域的數據稀缺問題。<lb/>此外，我們提出了 ICL-Net，一種有效的偽造定位網絡，具有三重流骨幹和圖像內對比學習。<lb/>這一設計使模型能夠捕捉高度穩健和可泛化的取證特徵。<lb/>廣泛的實驗表明，我們的方法在 PromptForge-350k 上達到了 62.5% 的 IoU，超越了 SOTA 方法 5.1%。<lb/>此外，它對常見降質具有強大的穩健性，IoU 降幅小於 1%，並在未見過的編輯模型上顯示出良好的泛化能力，平均 IoU 達到 41.5%。
2603.29386.author: Jianpeng Wang et.al.
2603.29386.authors: Jianpeng Wang, Haoyu Wang, Baoying Chen, Jishen Zeng, Yiming Qin, Yiqi Yang, Zhongjie Ba
